title: Croatian Berry Sweet Bread
description: A sweet bread recipe combining the flavors of Croatia with fresh berries, perfect for a breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: gluten-free option: substitute with 1:1 ratio of almond flour

instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine milk and yeast. Let it sit for 5 minutes to activate the yeast.
2. Add flour, salt, sugar, and diced apple to the bowl. Mix until a sticky dough forms.
3. Knead the dough on a floured surface for 10 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
4. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
6. Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
7. Place the loaf on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Let the bread cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before slicing.
10. Serve warm with fresh berries on top.
